chat_1775533513060.content:
Title: Aryan Pratap – B.Tech CS (AI/ML & IoT) Student Portfolio
Key Points:
  - Full‑stack web development using Node.js, EJS, React, MongoDB; projects deployed online.
  - Machine learning models for image classification with Python, pandas, NumPy.
  - IoT and embedded work: smart door with ESP32, RFID, ultrasonic, IR sensors, OLED display.
  - Additional projects: Portfolio showcase, MongoDB Atlas dashboard, AgroTech platform, hand‑gesture & face‑recognition system.
Summary: Aryan Pratap is a Computer Science undergraduate at GLA University focusing on AI/ML and IoT. He has created several full‑stack applications—including a portfolio site, a MongoDB monitoring dashboard, and an agriculture marketplace—using Node.js, React, and MongoDB, all deployed publicly. Academically, he builds image‑classification ML models with Python libraries. In IoT, he engineered a secure smart door with multi‑sensor integration and a web‑based ESP32 controller. He also developed hand‑gesture and face‑recognition solutions using OpenCV. His technical repertoire covers Python, Java, JavaScript, React, Node.js, Flask, FastAPI, and cloud development tools.
